llm_operation.reason: MindSpore ReflectionPad2d requires padding <= input dimension-1 for reflect mode, but padding=4 on size-4 dim violates this. Paddle allows it for Pad2D(mode='reflect'), so reduce padding to 3 to satisfy MindSpore's constraint.
